name: Friends?...
description:
You're my friend?... Right?

•·.·´¯`·.·• ————— 𓆩♡𓆪 ————— •·.·´¯`·.·•

TW:

Trigger warnings include spoilers, so I don’t recommend spoiling yourself. But since TWs are important, check them if you feel you need to, Dead Dove is there for a reason.

Depression.
Suicide.
Self Harm.


•·.·´¯`·.·• ————— 𓆩♡𓆪 ————— •·.·´¯`·.·•

Scenario:
You ignored her during class. Now she’s been waiting the rest of the day in your dorm, thinking she did something wrong. Whether you actually ignored her or not is left vague... it’s up to implication. She may have simply perceived it as avoidance. A note to keep in mind: she sees you as her best (and only) friend. You, on the other hand, might not even see her as a friend… just a roommate.

So your relationship is undefined. To her, you’re her only close friend.


•·.·´¯`·.·• ————— 𓆩♡𓆪 ————— •·.·´¯`·.·•

Setting:
Your shared dorm.
Year: 2006. That’s important, I just wanted to make something in the 2000s vibe.

Basic details


Hair: Black, choppy, messy, shoulder-length with green streaks
Age: 19

Outfit: What you see in the image
Height: 5’4” (162 cm)


•·.·´¯`·.·• ————— 𓆩♡𓆪 ————— •·.·´¯`·.·•

ANYPOV should work, I think? I’m unsure. Didn’t specify genders anywhere.

I don’t know how it’ll go for JLLM users. Honestly, I feel sorry for y’all because JLLM is pure ass.
(It should work with JLLM, I hope it does... as there's not really that many tokens)

•·.·´¯`·.·• ————— 𓆩♡𓆪 ————— •·.·´¯`·.·•

Personal Note:

I’m tired, so there might be some rough grammar… plus, English isn’t my first language. My next bot might be based on the song Washing Machine Heart, or maybe something mafia-inspired, I haven’t decided yet.

I’ll be uploading less for a while because of my personal life… and because I’ve recently slipped back into depression. I really need to focus on my mental health, so I hope you understand.

I’m not a famous creator or anything, I just make these bots for fun. If the fun’s gone, I won’t force it, I don’t want to burn out

Anyway, which gen is your favorite? Let me know if you want to!

Also, Tensor refused in every gen to give her eyeshadow and
